name: azure-devops
summary: Connect Codex to Azure Boards work items and Azure Repos code evidence.
purpose: Use this plugin when Codex needs provider-backed Azure DevOps context for planning, ticket hygiene, repository inspection, pull request evidence, or safe work item updates.
whenToUse: Find, summarize, create, update, or comment on Azure Boards work items.
Inspect Azure Repos repositories, refs, commits, files, or pull requests.
Connect code changes with planning evidence before or after implementation.
Check connection, organization, project, and repository allowlist setup.

safety.authModel: Hosted Microsoft Entra OAuth or local Azure CLI/PAT fallback outside chat.
safety.writeModel: Work item writes are preview-first and require an explicit apply step.

installNotes: The checked-in MCP manifest points at the bundled local stdio server.
Hosted deployment manifests are generated separately from a public HTTPS base URL.
Use the setup/status tools before asking the user for fallback auth.
